creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is a bug against the qemu-bsd-user code that manifests itself in the build of firebird25-client.

A build will fail during the interpretation of many semctl() calls, specifically here in this strace output:

37453 stat("/etc/nsswitch.conf",0x9fffd048) = 0
37453 open("/etc/group",0x100000,0666) = 6
37453 fstat(6,0x9fffcdd0) = 0

37453 read(6,0x45462000,4096) = 442

37453 close(6) = 0
